items.title: JPMorgan Names CVS a Top Pick as Turnaround Gains Traction
items.description: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) is included among the 20 Best Performing Dividend Stocks in 2025. The stock dropped 43% in 2024, then swung the other way with an 80.5% gain this year. Even after that run, Wall Street still sees room to move. The average analyst price target points to another 19% upside.Earlier in December, […]

items.title: JPMorgan Backs Citigroup (C) as Russia Sale Lifts Capital Ratio
items.description: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) is included among the 20 Best Performing Dividend Stocks in 2025. On December 30, JPMorgan kept an Overweight rating on Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) after the bank said it plans to sell its remaining operations in Russia. The company expects to take a pre-tax loss of $1.2 billion in the fourth quarter, tied […]
